flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tompkins Cortland Community College rose 31% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $15.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tompkins Cortland Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.8k → $4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tompkins Cortland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.3% → 0.0%).
